'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 66''' was the sixty-sixth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 2]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Detailing the Rebel Assault
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Elan Sel'Sabagno/Legends|Elan Sleazebaggano]]
*[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] - [[Asteroid/Legends|Asteroid]] Rings
*[[ES-PSA|RIC-920 Rickshaw Droid]]
*[[Star Map|Holographic Star Maps]]
*[[Swoop/Legends|Swoop Bikes]]
